授業目的:
To improve
presentation skills, such that participants can effectively delivery
presentations with visual support, both individually and in pairs.
到達目標:
By the end of the
course, learners will be better able to:

Present ideas using a coherent structure, appropriate connecting language, and
paralinguistic skills (e.g. eye contact, posture/gestures, intonation) for
individual presentationsPresent ideas using a coherent structure, appropriate connecting language, and
paralinguistic skills (e.g. eye contact, posture/gestures, intonation) for
paired presentationsUse visual aids (e.g. poster/ppt) to support presentation contentUse spoken interaction skills learned in semester 1 to participate in in-class
discussions and class activitiesUse topic specific language to effectively communicate on selected topicsUnderstand  and
use a range of low-frequency vocabulary itemsDevelop vocabulary and
reading fluency through regular extensive reading tasks
特記事項: 【合併】英語IIｄ　２２（経済学部）/英語IVｂ　２２（経済学部）
授業方法:
Classes will be
interactive and group-work based, with some language and skills guidance from
the teacher. Learners are expected to participate actively in all tasks to gain
the maximum benefit to their spoken English skills. There will be a range of
spoken tasks, including group discussions, presentations, supported by
listening tasks. Flex hours tasks will be used to develop vocabulary and
self-expression skills through additional assignments. Materials will include a
selection from the textbook as well as additional materials distributed in
class and on LUNA.
